strings.ITEM_BARRAGEONBOSS_PICKUP: Chance to spawn temporary gold chunks on hit. Pick up gold chunks to build up a powerful missile strike for your next high-damage skill hit.
strings.ITEM_BARRAGEONBOSS_DESC: Enemies hit have a <style=cIsUtility>20%</style> chance to drop a temporary <style=cShrine>gold chunk</style>. Every <style=cIsUtility>5</style> gold chunks picked up will call down a missile that deals <style=cIsDamage>2x800%</style> <style=cStack>(+600% per stack)</style> TOTAL damage the next time you hit an enemy with a <style=cIsUtility>skill</style> that deals <style=cIsDamage>400%</style> damage or more. <style=cSub>Maximum of 5 missiles.</style>
